title: seseli elatum subsp. heterophyllum
intro: Seseli elatum subsp. heterophyllum is a subspecies of the Seseli elatum plant, commonly known as tall hemlock or false hemlock, which belongs to the carrot family (Apiaceae). The medicinal properties of Seseli elatum subsp. heterophyllum lie in its essential oils, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory infections. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce pain and inflammation, and combat infections. Seseli elatum subsp. heterophyllum is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to relieve symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory issues, as well as to aid in digestion.
